title: RNA Isolation from Plant Tissue Protocol Using pBIOZOL Method
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.4rdgv26

steps.title: Grind tissue to a powder in liquid nitrogen
steps.instruction: Grind tissue to a powder in liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.3 mL of cold ( 4 °C ) pBIOZOL Reagent for up to 100 mg of frozen, ground tissue.

steps.title: Incubate the tube for 00:05:00 at 20 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate the tube for 00:05:00 at 20 °C . Lay the tube down horizontally to maximize surface area during RNA extraction.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 00:02:00 at
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 00:02:00 at .

steps.title: Add 100 µL of 5 Molarity...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of 5 Molarity (M) NaCl to the extract.

steps.title: Add 300 µL of chloroform
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of chloroform.

steps.title: Centrifuge the sample at 4 °C...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the sample at 4 °C for 00:10:00 at to separate the phases.

steps.title: Add to the aqueous phase an...
steps.instruction: Add to the aqueous phase an equal volume of isopropyl alcohol.

steps.title: Centrifuge the sample at 4 °C for 00:10:00 at
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the sample at 4 °C for 00:10:00 at .

steps.title: Decant the supernatant, taking care not to lose the pellet
steps.instruction: Decant the supernatant, taking care not to lose the pellet.

steps.title: Centrifuge at Room temperature for 00:05:00 at
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at Room temperature for 00:05:00 at .

steps.title: Add 10 µL – 30 µL...
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL – 30 µL RNase-free water to dissolve the RNA.

steps.title: Mix by briefly vortexing or flicking...
steps.instruction: Mix by briefly vortexing or flicking the bottom of the tube until the sample is thoroughly suspended.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to an RNase-free tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to an RNase-free tube.

steps.title: Tap tube to mix
steps.instruction: Tap tube to mix.

steps.title: Mix thoroughly by inversion
steps.instruction: Mix thoroughly by inversion.

steps.title: Transfer the top aqueous phase to an RNase-free tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the top aqueous phase to an RNase-free tube.

steps.title: Mix
steps.instruction: Mix.

steps.title: Let stand at 20 °C for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Let stand at 20 °C for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Add 1 mL of chilled 75...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of chilled 75 % ethanol to the pellet. Pellet may be difficult to see.

steps.title: Decant the liquid carefully, taking care...
steps.instruction: Decant the liquid carefully, taking care not to lose the pellet.

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge to collect the residual...
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge to collect the residual liquid and remove it with a pipette.

steps.title: Pipette the water up and down...
steps.instruction: Pipette the water up and down over the pellet to dissolve the RNA. If any cloudiness is observed, centrifuge the solution at Room temperature for 00:01:00 at and transfer the supernatant to a fresh tube.
